titles.title: Wake up Sleeper (Thank God for the Daylight…)

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v3 v4 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Thank God for the daylight I spent a long time in the dark Felt good saying goodbye Waking up to a brand new heart

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And if you're sleeping like I used to be In a grave that holds you tight There's a Savior calling Promising a brand new life He's saying

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Wake up sleeper Open your eyes Oh sinner, arise Leave your past at the door

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Wake up sleeper Come to the light Christ is alive /:Death don't live here anymore.:/

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I bet you like that freedom I bet you like your new name Oh, welcome to the kingdom Yeah, we all feel that way

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: So if you see somebody sleeping like The way you used to be Tell 'em 'bout the Savior And a little thing called free Go ahead and say

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Rise up and come out of that grave Rise up in that amazing grace Oh sleeper, won't you Come awake, come awake
